narrative:
Tiffin Township has 1,112 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.1 percentage points.
